name: Slow Cooker Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the vegetables at the bottom of the slow cooker.
2. Place the meat on top of the vegetables.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Add about 3 tablespoons water to the slow cooker.
5. Cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours.
6. Make gravy by mixing 3 tablespoons flour and 1/4 cup water into a smooth paste.
7. Stir the paste into the slow cooker and cook on High until the gravy thickens.
